title: Fragmented Coals
description: A mod that adds coal fragments. An item that smelts exactly one item.
body: Have you ever been playing in the early game and had exactly seven items to smelt instead of eight? Have you ever had to deal with automation wasting coal for just a few items to smelt? Well here is your solution. Fragmented Coals adds an Item called Coal Fragments which smelt exactly one item. The aim with this item is to help early game resource mangement and late game automation. To obtain a coal fragment simply throw a peice of coal into your crafting grid, youll recieve eight fragments. You can now use these to smelt one item at a time. But wait there's more! Did you accidentally craft more coal into fragments than you meant to? Well if you put eight fragments in your nearest crafting table in a donut shape you can craft your fragments back into coal. But wait there's even more. are you in world without coal? or just trying to make a self contatined farm? Well then charcoal is also fully suported for all your smelting and fragmenting needs. This is a a reupload of my mod from Curseforge
